title: Elemental Horns
description: This mod adds in some horns with elemental powers to improve the uses for horns.
body:
Welcome the Elemental Horns mod, this mod adds some interesting functionalities to horns in Minecraft, in the past horns served little to no purpose, but now they can be turned into powerful magical weapons.

The Air Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing phantom membranes in the corners, and feathers on the sides. The Air Horn can launch any nearby into the air, it is excellent for open spaces, however do the nature of the horn it won't be very effective in enclose spaces, and inside buildings.

The Earth Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing obsidian in the corners, and stone on the sides. The Earth Horn will trap any nearby mob in a chunk of a stone, suffocating them, also this horn can be good for turning hostile mobs into a defensive barrier.

The Ender Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing eye's of ender in the corners, and ender pearls on the sides. The Ender Horn will give the player additional Health, Strength, and Regeneration for a limited amount of time, making them far harder for hostile mobs to bring down.

The Ice Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table and surrounding it with Ice. The Ice Horn will give nearby mobs the slowness and weakness effects making them easier to fight.

The Lightning Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table and surrounding it with copper ingots. The Lighting Horn will strike all nearby mobs with several bolts of lightning, eliminating most mobs instantly.

The Nether Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing magma blocks in the corners, and blaze powder on the sides. The Nether Horn will cause all nearby mobs to catch fire, perfect for cooking mobs.

The TNT Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing gunpowder in the corners, and TNT on the sides. The TNT Horn will cause any nearby mobs to instantly explode, however if the player is to close they will get caught up in the explosions.

The Water Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing prismerine shards on the sides, and hearts of the sees on the top and bottom of the crafting table. The Water Horn will give the player the Night Vision, Water Breathing, Dolphins Grace, and Speed making it perfect for underwater adventures.

The Wither Horn: Crafted by putting a goat horn in the middle of the crafting table, placing bones in the corners, and wither skulls on the sides. The Wither Horn will inflict all neabry mobs with the Wither effect causing them to take high amounts of damage.

This mod was is compatible with most other mods, I haven't found any that it isn't consistent with, for additional help crafting the horns look at Just Enough Items, this mod was created for Neoforge 1.20.6.
